# Sao Paulo

> Geotechnical engineering company in Brasil, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Analise Amplificacao Sismica](https://sao-paulo.sondajespt.com/analise-amplificacao-sismica/)
- [Analise Estabilidade Taludes](https://sao-paulo.sondajespt.com/analise-estabilidade-taludes/)
- [Analise Liquefacao Solos](https://sao-paulo.sondajespt.com/analise-liquefacao-solos/)
- [Analise Recalque Diferencial](https://sao-paulo.sondajespt.com/analise-recalque-diferencial/)

- Website: https://sao-paulo.sondajespt.com/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Brasil.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
